description: ADR-598 G10 — dependency-cruiser ratchet baseline for gate "boundaries". Counts violations of rules [services-not-to-components, not-to-dxf-internals, no-test-utils-in-prod] over src/ (config: .dependency-cruiser.cjs). Ratchet DOWN only: a rise blocks the PR. Reseed via CI seed dispatch after a legitimate reduction.
